name: Vidalia Onion Quiche
recipeIngredient: 4 bacon strips, fried crisp and crumbled
recipeInstructions: Cook onion in butter until lightly browned. Spoon into baked pie shell. Combine milk, sour cream, salt, eggs, and flour. Mix well and pour over onion mixture. Garnish with bacon. Bake for 30 minutes at 325 degrees (or until firm in the center). Serves 6 to 8.
